scripts.c:compile: mkdir -p circuits/build && npx --yes circom@2.1.9 circuits/wordline.circom --wasm --r1cs --sym --output circuits/build
scripts.c:setup: mkdir -p circuits/artifacts && npx --yes snarkjs@0.7.4 groth16 setup circuits/build/wordline.r1cs circuits/artifacts/ptau/powersOfTau28_hez_final_10.ptau circuits/artifacts/wordline.zkey && npx --yes snarkjs@0.7.4 zkey export verificationkey circuits/artifacts/wordline.zkey circuits/artifacts/wordline.vkey.json
scripts.c:export: npx --yes snarkjs@0.7.4 zkey export solidityverifier circuits/artifacts/wordline.zkey circuits/artifacts/Verifier.sol
scripts.c:prove: npx --yes snarkjs@0.7.4 groth16 prove circuits/artifacts/wordline.zkey circuits/build/wordline_js/wordline.wasm circuits/build/input.json circuits/build/proof.json circuits/build/public.json
scripts.c:verify: npx --yes snarkjs@0.7.4 groth16 verify circuits/artifacts/wordline.vkey.json circuits/build/public.json circuits/build/proof.json
